description: The password strength module can be used to enforce XLST defined password requirements for basic and full Verify Identity Access users. More detailed information about rule syntax can be found [here](https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/sva/latest?topic=methods-password-strength). Rules are uploaded to a deployment from files, the name of the file is used as the resulting password strength rule in Verify Identity Access.

items.description: Path to XSLT file to be uploaded as password strength check.
